title: Executive Research Analyst (INT/TMP)
description:
Are you eager to learn how top-level professionals are identified and matched to senior roles?

At HRnetOne, we specialise in executive search for senior-level professionals across industries. We strongly believe in cultivating a learning culture, and as part of our team, you’ll be paired with mentors who are some of the best in the HR industry.

Learning opportunities:

  • Gain exposure to sourcing candidates for senior position
  • Strengthen market research, strategic thinking, and industry-mapping skills
  • Learn to analyse candidates beyond their resumes

Job description:

  • Conduct targeted research and source candidates using to identify potential candidates and gather market insights
  • Support interview scheduling, outreach and cold calling
  • Assist consultants with presentations, talent-mapping reports, and market analysis

Who we are looking for:

  • Fast learner who thrives in a fast-paced environment
  • Strong research, analytical, and organizational
  • Confident communicator with strong multitasking abilities

Work Location: Orchard
Working Schedule: Monday - Friday, 8.30am - 5.30pm

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

postedCompany.description:
HRnet One is the flagship brand of HRnetGroup, the largest Asia-based recruitment agency in Asia Pacific (excluding Japan). Since our founding in Singapore in 1992, we have grown to a network of over 1,000 consultants across 18 cities, dedicated to providing bespoke talent acquisition solutions to our clients.

At HRnet One, we believe in the power of human connection. We go beyond traditional recruitment to consciously engineer meaningful interactions between exceptional talent and leading organizations. Our approach is built on a deep understanding of our clients' unique needs and a relentless commitment to finding the perfect fit.

We are a team of passionate, entrepreneurial, and driven individuals. Our success is a result of our purpose-driven work and our commitment to a co-ownership model that aligns our consultants' success with the growth of our company.

If you are looking to build a career in a dynamic and fast-paced environment where you can make a real impact on people's lives and businesses, HRnet One is the place for you. Join us in shaping the future of work, one connection at a time.
postedCompany.name: HRNET ONE PTE LTD
